creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 151446
Proposed patch (since 372234 revision)

Patch to update security/silktools port from 3.9.0 to 3.10.0 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://tools.netsa.cert.org/silk/releasenotes.html#release-3.10.0

- Add license information
- Add IPV6RECORDS option to "enable support for capturing, storing, and querying flow records containing IPv6 addresses" (replaced by "Support for analysis of flow records containing IPv6 addresses"). This is not related to "support for listening-on/connecting-to IPv6 network sockets", which is enabled by default, hence is not IPV6 named option
- Add STATIC (default) option, because it was disabled for new version
- Add PYTHON (default) option, which allows to disable it, when needed
- Replace LOCALTIME_CONFIGURE_ON with LOCALTIME_CONFIGURE_ENABLE
- Add OPTIONS_SUB to use options with pkg-plist
- Adapt pkg-plist for new version
